title: Purple Axiom workspace contract validation report

workspace_registry_version.description: The `registry_version` of the workspace contract registry instance used for validation.

target_path.description: Workspace-root-relative final publish target (file or directory root). Must not end with '/'.

generated_at_utc.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp. Treated as volatile metadata for semantic comparisons.

max_errors_per_artifact.description: The maximum number of errors collected per artifact before truncation.

artifacts.description: Per-artifact validation summaries. MUST be sorted by artifact_path (UTF-8 byte order).

artifact_path.description: Workspace-root-relative POSIX path to the validated artifact.
Workspace-root-relative POSIX path to the artifact that failed validation.

error_code.description: Optional stable, machine-readable token for the class of validation failure.

instance_path.description: JSON Pointer to the failing instance location ("" for document root).

schema_path.description: JSON Pointer to the failing schema location ("" if unavailable).

keyword.description: Optional JSON Schema keyword that triggered the failure (e.g., required, type).

line_number.description: 1-indexed line number for JSONL validation errors and JSONL parse errors.
